hero.subtitle: Certified, experienced industrial technicians with over 10 years of combined field experience. Trusted by industry leaders including NICO Industrial Services and Mourik, with a proven track record at the world's largest refineries.

services.subtitle: Specialised technical services delivered to refineries and petrochemical facilities across Europe — with safety, precision, and reliability at the core.

items.title: Reactor Technician Services
items.desc: Certified reactor technicians deployed to petroleum refineries across Europe, operating under the strictest HSE and safety procedures.

items.title: Catalyst Changeout
items.desc: Full catalyst changeout operations — unloading, screening, sock-loading and dense-loading — executed with precision and in full compliance with refinery protocols.

items.title: Safety & Compliance
items.desc: Our crew holds European-issued certifications in Confined Space Entry, Rigging, and Forklift operation. We deliver to the highest safety standards, every time.

items.title: Specialist Personnel Supply
items.desc: Core crew of 4 BA specialists on permanent contracts, scalable up to 12 personnel on demand. Fluent English. Ready for immediate international deployment.

items.title: Certified & Experienced
items.desc: Officially recommended by industry leaders including Mourik, with reference letters on file. 10+ years of combined experience at some of the world's largest refineries.

items.title: Scalable & Flexible
items.desc: From single-technician support to full crew mobilisation across Europe. We scale to your project requirements with short notice.

track_record.subtitle: Our crews have delivered successful projects at some of the most demanding refinery and petrochemical facilities in the world.

about.title: GEMBA Industrial Services
about.p1: GEMBA Industrial Services is a specialist division of GEMBA Team EOOD providing certified reactor technician crews and catalyst changeout services to petroleum refineries across Europe.
about.p2: Our team brings over 10 years of combined field experience, including 5 years each as full-time employees with NICO Industrial Services UK and Mourik — two of Europe's leading industrial service companies. We hold official reference letters from Mourik confirming the quality of our work.
about.p3: Our core crew of 4 BA-qualified specialists holds European-certified qualifications in Confined Space Entry, Rigging, and Forklift operation. We are fully fluent in English and operate to the highest HSE standards on every project, scalable to 12 personnel on demand.

team.name: Slavcho Ivanov
team.bio: Over 10 years of hands-on experience in catalyst changeout operations and reactor servicing at major European refineries including Shell, ExxonMobil, BP, Neste, and ORLEN. SCC/VCA certified (TÜV Rheinland), BA/N2 inert entry qualified, with certifications in confined space operations, crane operation, rigging, and forklift handling. Previously employed by NICO Industrial Services UK and Mourik.
team.tagline: Leading from the front — inside the reactor, not behind a desk.

careers.intro: We're looking for experienced industrial technicians who thrive in demanding environments. If you have refinery experience and the right certifications, we want to hear from you.
careers.tech_desc: We're looking for experienced reactor technicians and BA specialists for catalyst changeout operations at European refineries. Deployment across Europe with competitive daily rates.
needs: Experience in catalyst changeout or reactor servicing
Valid passport and work permit for EU
careers.no_role: We're always looking for skilled industrial technicians. Send us your CV.

contact.title: Ready to Work Together?
contact.subtitle: Looking for specialist reactor technicians or a complete catalyst changeout crew? Contact us to discuss your project requirements.
